'''Morrs''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. He was the head of the scanning team sent to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] to determine if [[Kyp Durron]] had stolen the [[Sun Crusher]]. His team was unable to find conclusive readings.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
